zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Holland I於1197年11月1日出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，他的父親Mathew de Holland21歲，母親Margaret de Harcourt32歲。他於1220年與Cecily de Columbers在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1242年在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Holland I于1197年11月1日出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，他的父亲Mathew de Holland21岁，母亲Margaret de Harcourt32岁。他于1220年与Cecily de Columbers在英国英格兰藍卡爾武普 霍蘭结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1242年在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howland
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Holland I was born on 1 November 1197, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, his father, Mathew de Holland, was 21 and his mother, Margaret de Harcourt, was 32. He married Cecily de Columbers in 1220, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1242, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Holland I est né le 1 novembre 1197, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Mathew de Holland, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Harcourt, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Columbers en 1220, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1220 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Cecily de Columbers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1242 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Cecily de Columbers nel 1220, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Holland Iが1197年11月1日にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Mathew de Hollandは21歳，母Margaret de Harcourtは32歳であった。1220年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドでCecily de Columbersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1242年に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Holland I(이)가 1197년 11월 1일 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathew de Holland(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Harcourt(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 Cecily de Columbers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1242년 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 플레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Holland I nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1197, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Mathew de Holland, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Harcourt, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Columbers em 1220, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Holland I родился 1 ноября 1197 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Mathew de Holland было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Harcourt, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Columbers в 1220 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1242 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
